content.speakerText: You can pick up your bags anytime before midnight tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 您明天午夜前都可以来取行李。

options.text: Can I pick them up at 1 AM tomorrow?
What documents do I need to bring?
How much does it cost to store my bags?
Can you deliver them to my hotel?

content.explanation: 正确答案询问所需证件，符合确认取件流程的合理回应。其他选项：A 选项时间超出允许范围（午夜后），C 选项询问费用（场景未涉及），D 选项请求配送（与取件场景不符）

content.speakerText: Just show your receipt and ID.
content.speakerTextCn: 出示收据和身份证即可。

options.text: Is a driver’s license acceptable as ID?
Can I pay extra to avoid showing ID?
Do you have lockers for bags?
What time do you close tonight?

content.explanation: 正确答案询问身份证的替代形式，属于对证件要求的合理延伸。B 选项试图绕过规定（不合逻辑），C 和 D 与取件凭证无关，偏离核心信息

content.speakerText: Your luggage will be held until 11:59 PM tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的行李将保留到明天晚上11:59。

options.text: I’ll come at 7 PM then. Thanks!
Can I get a refund if I don’t pick them up?
Can I leave my suitcase here permanently?
Do you offer insurance for luggage?

content.explanation: 正确答案明确确认取件时间，符合场景功能。B 选项涉及退款（未提及），C 选项要求长期存放（超出服务范围），D 选项询问保险（无关需求）

content.template: I'd like to pick up my bags ___ tomorrow.
content.hint: 对方提到的取件时间范围

content.template: To collect my luggage, I need to show my ___ and ID.
content.hint: 取件时必须出示的纸质凭证

content.template: Could I ___ my bags in the evening?

content.speakerText: You can pick up your bags anytime before midnight tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 您明天午夜前都可以来取行李。
expectedAnswers: That works for me—I’ll come back in the evening.
Great, thanks! I plan to collect them around 8 PM.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应取件时间，符合对方提供的时间范围
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当的时态和表达
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯，语气礼貌
关键词覆盖：使用了 'pick up' 或 'collect' 和具体时间

content.speakerText: Just show your receipt and ID.
content.speakerTextCn: 出示收据和身份证即可。
expectedAnswers: Got it. I’ll make sure to bring both.
Do I need my passport instead of a national ID?
Perfect—I’ve kept the receipt safe in my wallet.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：确认理解或合理追问证件要求
语言准确性：正确使用 'receipt', 'ID', 'passport' 等关键词
表达自然度：语气自然，符合服务场景对话节奏
关键词覆盖：至少包含 'receipt' 或 'ID' 或 'passport'

content.speakerText: Your luggage will be held until 11:59 PM tomorrow.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的行李将保留到明天晚上11:59。
expectedAnswers: Thanks—I’ll pick them up before 10 PM.
Is there a late fee if I come after 9 PM?
I’ll be there right before closing. Appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应取件计划或合理确认政策
语言准确性：使用正确的时间表达和动词短语
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合服务场景，避免生硬
关键词覆盖：使用 'pick up', 'luggage', 'before [time]' 或 'closing'
